post.description: 调度器内部回调接口，用于触发任务到期通知

delete.description: Deletes a comment. The author and document owners/editors can delete comments.

patch.description: Updates comment state such as resolved/unresolved. Authors and document owners/editors can resolve comments.

post.description: 查找或创建当前用户的“日记”空间，并打开当天 YYYY-MM-DD.md 私人文档。
查找或创建当前用户指定日期 YYYY-MM-DD.md 私人文档。
post.summary: 打开或创建指定日期日记

post.description: Creates a resumable Markdown import session. Use collaboration_mode=collaborative for shared docs or private for private docs.

delete.description: Deletes temporary uploaded chunks and assets for an unfinished import session.

post.description: Uploads an image asset referenced by the Markdown file and records its original relative path for link rewriting.

parameters.description: Original relative path in Markdown, such as images/a.png
parameters.name: original_path

post.description: Assembles uploaded chunks, rewrites local image references to uploaded asset URLs, and creates a document.

put.description: Uploads one raw binary Markdown chunk for a resumable import session.

get.description: Returns document-level comments for a document, meeting note, or todo. Diary documents are rejected.

post.description: Creates a document-level comment for a document, meeting note, or todo. Diary documents are rejected.

patch.description: Saves plain Markdown content for diary documents. Only the owner can save, and this does not write the Yjs update log.

post.description: 使用用户名或邮箱和密码登录
注销当前用户的登录状态
新建 Notion 风格会议纪要，默认启用协作并写入会议模板。

parameters.description: 可选：指定 project_id 或自定义标题
parameters.name: req

post.description: Creates a lightweight todo in the same space as the meeting note.

get.description: 获取项目列表，并支持按名称搜索
根据 ID 获取项目信息

delete.description: 删除指定项目及其关联任务

patch.description: 更新项目名称、颜色和排序等信息

get.description: Returns recent-first paged document activity records backed by task_events. Supports filtering by document id.

parameters.description: Oldest loaded activity id, used to load older records
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: Returns task event rows after a cursor for reconnect/backfill. The cursor is the task_events auto-increment id.

patch.description: 更新任务的标题、状态、优先级、截止时间和排序等元数据

post.description: 邀请一个用户加入任务协作，并授予 editor/viewer 角色

delete.description: 从任务协作成员列表里移除指定用户

get.description: Returns local-node metrics for project event and document content WebSocket hubs.

post.description: 注册新用户，支持头像上传

get.description: Searches current user's spaces and active documents/todos.
获取指定空间下的任务列表

post.description: 在指定空间中创建任务或文档

get.description: 获取当前用户参与的任务，并支持状态和截止时间过滤
获取单个任务的详细信息

delete.description: 把指定任务移入回收站

get.description: Returns soft-deleted spaces for the current user.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a space that is already in trash.

get.description: Returns the current user's soft-deleted tasks/documents.

delete.description: Hard-deletes a task/document that is already in trash.

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted task/document back to its space.

get.description: 获取当前登录用户的详细信息

patch.description: 更新当前用户的个人资料、头像和密码
